info.name: Student Survey API (Lucas Mohler)
info.description: CRUD + validation tests for the FastAPI/SQLModel Student Survey backend. Set base_url to http://localhost:8000 for local dev or http://<node-ip>:30080 for the deployed NodePort (proxied through nginx). Run the whole collection top-to-bottom (Collection Runner or Newman): it creates 5 surveys, verifies they coexist, reads/updates/deletes each one, verifies they're gone, then exercises validation errors (missing required fields, invalid enum/email values, and 404s on unknown ids).
